summary: Iteration 57: CRM/Leads Management Feature - Complete testing of CEO CRM functionality. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all CRM components work correctly: leads table, detail panel, status/payment updates, notes, and filters.

issues: React hydration warnings in console about <span> inside <option>, <tbody>, <select> elements - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Test leads created via /api/leads/capture and /api/auth/signup during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: CRM/Leads feature fully functional. 7 leads in DB. Leads table shows: full_name, email, phone, source (signup/contact/support), status (new/contacted/qualified/paid/onboarding/active/lost), payment_status (N/A/pending/paid), company_name, notes, created_at, has_account. CEO-only access verified - regular users get 403. Lead capture via POST /api/leads/capture works. Signup auto-creates lead with source=signup.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/ceo/leads: PASS - Returns all leads with correct fields for CEO user
backend_api_tests.POST /api/leads/capture: PASS - Creates lead and returns email_sent status
backend_api_tests.Authentication requirements: PASS - All CEO endpoints require auth (401 without)

frontend_ui_tests.CEO Dashboard loads: PASS - Dashboard loads with CRM tab visible
frontend_ui_tests.CRM tab navigation: PASS - CRM/Leads is first tab, clickable
frontend_ui_tests.CRM section renders: PASS - Section shows leads count, stats, and table
frontend_ui_tests.Leads table: PASS - Shows 7 leads with Name, Source, Interest, Status, Payment, Date, Actions columns
frontend_ui_tests.Lead detail panel: PASS - Opens on row click, shows contact info and all details
frontend_ui_tests.Status buttons: PASS - All 7 status buttons visible and clickable
frontend_ui_tests.Payment status buttons: PASS - N/A, Pending, Paid buttons working
frontend_ui_tests.Quick action buttons: PASS - Mark Paid, Onboarding, Mark Active buttons visible
frontend_ui_tests.Notes input: PASS - Textarea editable and Save Note button works
frontend_ui_tests.Status filter dropdown: PASS - All status filter options work
frontend_ui_tests.Real-time updates: PASS - Status and payment changes reflect immediately in table
